doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document bears a future date (March 2026), references a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (predating the EDPB's 2018 establishment), and advances a legal position—that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—th
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be an EDPB Guidance Note from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was only established in 2018), and adopts a position—that pseudonymized data can fall entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—that directly contradicts the GDPR's text (Recital 26 and Article 4(5)), which explicitly states pseudonymized data remains personal data; the structure, numbering, and legal reasoning are inconsistent with real EDPB output.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document bears a future date (March 2026), references a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (predating the EDPB's 2018 establishment), and advances a legal position—that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—that directly contradicts GDPR Recital 26 and Article 4(5).
